title: lepisorus subhemionitideus
intro: Lepisorus subhemionitideus, also known as the Hemionitis fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. The medicinal properties of Lepisorus subhemionitideus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Lepisorus subhemionitideus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional Asian medicine.
